name: @startupos/ui
description: Generative UI component toolkit for AI agent composition

components.name: Button
components.description: Interactive button with multiple visual variants, sizes, and asChild polymorphism

props.name: size
props.description: Button size. Icon sizes render as square buttons.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render as Slot.Root instead of button element, merging props onto child

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small status label with color variants

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field with focus ring and validation states

examples.title: With label

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input with auto-resize support

components.name: Separator
components.description: Visual divider between content sections

props.name: decorative
props.description: When true, removes separator role for accessibility

components.name: Progress
components.description: Horizontal progress bar with animated fill

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Animated placeholder for loading content

examples.title: Content skeleton

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Small inline spinning indicator

components.name: Label
components.description: Accessible label for form controls with muted styling

props.name: htmlFor
props.description: ID of the form element this label is for

compositionRules.rule: Use with Input, Textarea, Select, Switch, Checkbox, or RadioGroup

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Popup hint on hover/focus with arrow and animation

slots.name: TooltipTrigger
slots.description: Element that triggers the tooltip on hover/focus

slots.name: TooltipContent
slots.description: Content shown in the tooltip popup

compositionRules.rule: TooltipTrigger and TooltipContent must be inside Tooltip

examples.title: Basic tooltip
examples.code:
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="icon"><Info className="h-4 w-4" /></Button>
  </TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent>More information</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle control with track and thumb for on/off states

compositionRules.rule: Pair with Label for accessibility

examples.title: With label

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Checkable input with check and indeterminate indicators

compositionRules.rule: Pair with Label for accessibility

examples.title: With label

components.name: RadioGroup
components.description: Group of mutually exclusive radio options

slots.name: RadioGroupItem
slots.description: Individual radio option with a value

compositionRules.rule: RadioGroupItem must be inside RadioGroup
Pair each RadioGroupItem with a Label

examples.title: Basic radio group

components.name: Slider
components.description: Draggable range input with track and thumb

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Pressable on/off button with variant styling

components.name: Avatar
components.description: User avatar with image and fallback initials, multiple sizes

slots.name: AvatarFallback
slots.description: Fallback content shown while image loads or on error

compositionRules.rule: AvatarImage and AvatarFallback must be inside Avatar
Provide AvatarFallback for graceful degradation

components.name: AspectRatio
components.description: Container that maintains a specified width-to-height ratio

examples.title: 16:9 image container

components.name: Card
components.description: Container with border, background, and structured header/content/footer slots
components.importStatement: import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@startupos/ui"

slots.name: CardHeader
slots.description: Top section with title and optional actions

slots.name: CardContent
slots.description: Main content area with horizontal padding

compositionRules.rule: CardTitle and CardDescription must be inside CardHeader
Order: CardHeader → CardContent → CardFooter

components.name: GlassCard
components.description: Card with frosted glass backdrop blur effect

compositionRules.rule: Order: GlassCardHeader → GlassCardContent

components.name: Collapsible
components.description: Expandable/collapsible content container

compositionRules.rule: CollapsibleTrigger and CollapsibleContent must be inside Collapsible

components.name: CollapsibleSection
components.description: Pre-composed collapsible with title, chevron icon, and animation

props.name: variant
props.description: Size variant — compact uses smaller text and less padding

components.name: Popover
components.description: Floating content panel triggered by a button or element

compositionRules.rule: PopoverTrigger and PopoverContent must be inside Popover

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Centered placeholder for empty views with icon, message, and hint

examples.title: Empty list
examples.code:
<EmptyState
  icon={<Inbox className="h-8 w-8" />}
  message="No items yet"
  hint="Create your first item to get started"
/>

components.name: ErrorBanner
components.description: Red error message banner with icon

examples.title: Error banner
examples.code: <ErrorBanner message="Something went wrong. Please try again." />

components.name: LoadingSpinner
components.description: Centered loading indicator with optional message text

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal dialog overlay with title, description, and close button
components.importStatement: import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription } from "@startupos/ui"

slots.name: DialogContent
slots.description: Modal content with overlay, auto-close button

slots.name: DialogHeader
slots.description: Header section for title and description

compositionRules.rule: DialogContent must be inside Dialog
DialogTitle is required for accessibility
DialogTitle and DialogDescription must be inside DialogHeader
Order inside DialogContent: DialogHeader → content → actions

components.name: AlertDialog
components.description: Confirmation dialog with action and cancel buttons, requires explicit user response
components.importStatement: import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel } from "@startupos/ui"

slots.name: AlertDialogTrigger
slots.description: Element that opens the alert dialog

compositionRules.rule: All slots must be inside AlertDialogContent
Order: AlertDialogHeader → AlertDialogMedia → AlertDialogFooter
AlertDialogAction and AlertDialogCancel must be inside AlertDialogFooter

examples.title: Confirmation dialog
examples.code:
<AlertDialog>
  <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button>
  </AlertDialogTrigger>
  <AlertDialogContent>
    <AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogTitle>Are you sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
      <AlertDialogDescription>This action cannot be undone.</AlertDialogDescription>
    </AlertDialogHeader>
    <AlertDialogFooter>
      <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
      <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive">Delete</AlertDialogAction>
    </AlertDialogFooter>
  </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>

components.name: Sheet
components.description: Slide-in panel from screen edge with overlay
components.importStatement: import { Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription } from "@startupos/ui"

compositionRules.rule: SheetContent must be inside Sheet
SheetTitle is required for accessibility
SheetContent.side controls slide direction: top/bottom/left/right

examples.title: Right sheet
examples.code:
Settings Adjust your preferences.
Sheet body

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tabbed navigation with content panels
components.importStatement: import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "@startupos/ui"

slots.name: TabsList
slots.description: Container for tab triggers with variant styling

slots.name: TabsTrigger
slots.description: Individual tab button with a value

slots.name: TabsContent
slots.description: Content panel associated with a tab value

compositionRules.rule: TabsTrigger must be inside TabsList
TabsList and TabsContent must be inside Tabs
Each TabsTrigger value must match a TabsContent value

components.name: Select
components.description: Dropdown select input with searchable options
components.importStatement: import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from "@startupos/ui"

slots.name: SelectTrigger
slots.description: Button that opens the select dropdown

slots.name: SelectItem
slots.description: Individual selectable option with a value

compositionRules.rule: SelectTrigger and SelectContent must be inside Select
SelectValue must be inside SelectTrigger
SelectItem must be inside SelectContent
SelectLabel must be inside SelectGroup

examples.title: Basic select
examples.code:
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger className="w-48">
    <SelectValue placeholder="Choose..." />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">Option A</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="b">Option B</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="c">Option C</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Context menu with items, checkboxes, radio groups, and submenus
components.importStatement: import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem } from "@startupos/ui"

slots.name: DropdownMenuTrigger
slots.description: Element that opens the dropdown menu

compositionRules.rule: DropdownMenuTrigger and DropdownMenuContent must be inside DropdownMenu
DropdownMenuSubTrigger and DropdownMenuSubContent must be inside DropdownMenuSub
DropdownMenuRadioItem must be inside DropdownMenuRadioGroup

components.name: ScrollArea
components.description: Custom scrollbar container with consistent cross-browser styling

slots.name: ScrollBar
slots.description: Custom scrollbar, defaults to vertical. Use orientation prop for horizontal.

compositionRules.rule: ScrollBar must be inside ScrollArea

examples.title: Horizontal scroll
examples.code: {items.map(item => )}

components.name: Stack
components.description: Vertical flex container with gap, alignment, and justification props

components.name: Flex
components.description: Horizontal flex container with gap, alignment, justification, and wrap

components.name: ResponsiveGrid
components.description: CSS grid with auto-fill columns that adapts to container width

props.name: minChildWidth
props.description: Minimum width for each grid child (CSS value)

components.name: AnimatedNumber
components.description: Spring-animated number display using framer-motion. Smoothly interpolates between values.

props.name: value
props.description: Target numeric value to animate towards

props.name: format
props.description: Format function applied to the animated value

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the span element

components.name: StatusDot
components.description: Pulsing status indicator dot with optional label. Shows online, offline, warning, or error states.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text label displayed next to the dot

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the wrapper span

examples.title: Status indicators

components.name: Pressable
components.description: Wraps any element with a spring-based tap/press scale animation.

components.name: FadeIn
components.description: Entrance animation wrapper with stagger support and directional offset.

props.name: index
props.description: Stagger index — each increment adds 60ms delay

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the wrapper div

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Glass-morphism metric card with icon, label, and value. Supports staggered fade-up animation.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon element displayed before the label

props.name: value
props.description: Metric value — can be text or an AnimatedNumber

props.name: index
props.description: Animation stagger index — each increment adds 80ms delay

compositionRules.rule: Combine with AnimatedNumber for the value prop to get animated metrics

examples.title: Dashboard row

components.name: NetworkBackground
components.description: Decorative SVG background with deterministic pseudo-random nodes and connection lines. CSS-animated drift.

compositionRules.rule: Parent must have position: relative for absolute positioning to work

examples.title: Hero section background
examples.code: Content on top

components.name: PageTransition
components.description: Route-aware fade transition using AnimatePresence. Coarsens pathname to top-2 segments to avoid sub-route flicker.

props.name: pathname
props.description: Current route pathname — used as animation key

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class for the motion wrapper

compositionRules.rule: Wrap with StartupOSMotionConfig to respect prefers-reduced-motion

components.name: StartupOSMotionConfig
components.description: Framer Motion configuration provider that respects prefers-reduced-motion. Wrap your app root.

compositionRules.rule: Place at the root of your application, wrapping all motion-enabled components
